executiveSummary: Both user stories are fully compliant after two remediations applied during this audit cycle. FR-4 was fixed by switching to uploadType=multipart with a proper JSON metadata body (title + privacyStatus: unlisted). FR-5 was fixed by throwing YouTubeUnauthorizedError on 401, clearing the localStorage token, and calling disconnectYouTube() to reset the UI.
minorObservations: OAuth implicit flow (response_type=token) is deprecated by Google; PKCE migration recommended.
Upload progress shows spinner only, no byte percentage — acceptable per PRD but suboptimal for large files.
No client-side file-size guard before upload.
conclusionsAndRecommendations: All FRs and USs comply after the two remediations. Minor observations are non-blocking and suitable for a future iteration.

applied.description: Switch to uploadType=multipart with multipart/related body carrying JSON metadata (snippet.title, status.privacyStatus: unlisted) and binary video. Removed non-standard x-upload-* headers.

Export YouTubeUnauthorizedError; throw on 401 after clearing localStorage token. Add disconnectYouTube() to useYouTubeAuth and UseYouTubeAuthResult. Catch error in App.tsx uploadRecordingToYouTube callback and call disconnectYouTube().
